title: DTI CQB Tier-One
description: Elite close quarters battle program designed for advanced operators. Covers room clearing, hallway movement, stairwell procedures, and multi-room problem solving at the highest level.

title: Sniper/Observer ISOC
description: Comprehensive sniper and observer training integrating advanced marksmanship, field craft, observation techniques, range estimation, and mission planning for precision engagements.

title: Combat Training
description: Foundational combat training program covering weapons handling, tactical movement, communication under stress, and team-based combat operations in various environments.

title: Vehicle operations using military or civilian vehicles with tactical driving and convoy procedures for high-threat environments and personnel protection details.
description: Tactical vehicle operations covering convoy procedures, evasive driving, vehicle-mounted weapons systems, and motorcade security protocols for protection operations.

title: Small Unit Light Fighter
description: Small unit tactics training for light infantry operations including patrol techniques, ambush procedures, reconnaissance, and raids in various terrain and environments.

title: Television Transmitter
description: Technical training on secure communications systems, broadcast operations, signal intelligence, and electronic warfare countermeasures for field operations.

title: Tactical/Modern PRT Fitness
description: Physical readiness training program designed for tactical athletes. Combines strength, endurance, mobility, and combat-specific conditioning for operational performance.

title: Active Shooter Response
description: Comprehensive active threat response training for law enforcement and security professionals. Covers rapid deployment, threat neutralization, and casualty care integration.

title: VIP/Public Personal/International Protection
description: Executive protection training covering advance work, motorcade operations, threat assessment, close protection formations, and international security protocols.

title: Personality Identifier
description: Behavioral analysis and personality assessment training for intelligence professionals. Covers profiling techniques, deception detection, and interview/interrogation methods.

title: Bioluminescence Neutralize
description: Specialized night operations training covering low-light tactics, night vision operations, IR discipline, and nocturnal mission planning and execution.

title: Team Global Exercise Program
description: Multi-national joint exercise planning and execution. Covers coalition operations, interoperability standards, combined arms coordination, and multi-domain operations.

title: Church/School/Large Venue Protection
description: Security planning and response training for houses of worship, educational facilities, and large venue environments. Covers threat assessment, security team organization, and response protocols.
